import React from 'react'; import { Banknote, ShieldCheck } from 'lucide-react'; import { useCurrency } from '../context/CurrencyContext'; export default function LoansScreen({ openScreen }) { const currencyContext = useCurrency(); const formatAmount = currencyContext?.formatAmount || ((amt) => `₦${amt.toLocaleString()}`); return (

{formatAmount(5000)}

{/* Credit Score Button */} {/* No Hidden Fees Card */}

No Hidden Fees

Nest credit comes with a flat 0.5% monthly rate. No late fees, no processing charges.
